title: Halliburton 2026 Proxy Statement & 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary annual-report source for business scope, operating segments, revenue, margins, employee count, financials, competition, and risks.

title: Halliburton Drilling
note: Official product page for Halliburton drilling services, drill bits, directional drilling, managed pressure drilling, well control, optimization, and drilling portfolio context.

title: LOGIX automation and remote operations
note: Official product page for Halliburton drilling automation, remote operations, digital twins, machine learning, well placement, and real-time data workflows.

title: Halliburton Intelligent Completions
note: Official product page for intelligent completions, SmartWell systems, DataSphere monitoring, remote valves, and flow-control systems.

title: Halliburton OSDU Data Platform
note: Halliburton page describing DecisionSpace 365 on the OSDU Data Platform, data ownership, open architecture, APIs, plug-ins, and third-party applications.

title: Halliburton Market Capitalization
note: Market capitalization reference for Halliburton used in the registry market-cap metric.

title: Halliburton P/E Ratio
note: Trailing P/E ratio reference for Halliburton used in the point-in-time valuation metric.

title: WITSML Data Standards
note: Primary standards source for drilling, completions, interventions, wellsite-to-office transfers, LWD logs, planned trajectories, and near-real-time drilling data exchange.

title: PRODML Data Standards
note: Primary standards source for production optimization and standardized production data across wellbore, flow-network, testing, sensing, and time-series workflows.

title: The Open Group OSDU Forum
note: Official OSDU source describing the open-source, standards-based, cloud-native subsurface data platform and application standards.

title: OSDU Data Platform GitLab
note: Public GitLab group for OSDU Data Platform services, libraries, and Airflow DAGs delivered in milestone releases.

title: Open Porous Media Initiative
note: Open-source reservoir simulation and porous-media modeling source used to assess decentralization pressure from open subsurface modeling.

title: GEOS: Open-Source Simulator for Subsurface Energy Systems
note: Open-source high-performance subsurface simulator source for oil and gas, wellbore stability, fractures, geothermal, carbon storage, and underground energy storage workflows.
